use_cases: Landing pages for music platforms and streaming services
Artist or band portfolio showcase sections
ai_summary: A visually immersive hero section featuring real-time audio reactivity through canvas-based visualizations, animated film grain effects, and dynamic light beam animations. Uses Web Audio API for audio analysis, creating responsive morphing effects synced to music. Designed for dark-themed, cinematic presentations perfect for music platforms, artist portfolios, or creative showcases.
